user_story: As an Interviewer, I want to view candidates with scheduled interviews and their round status, so that I can identify candidates awaiting interview feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Feedback screen; When the list loads; Then candidates with Scheduled Interview statuses and round details are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As an Interviewer, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can quickly find the candidate whose feedback I need to record
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Feedback screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to schedule mass interviews from the feedback view, so that I can arrange further interview rounds for multiple candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Feedback screen; When I click Schedule Mass Interviews; Then I can schedule interviews for the selected candidates

user_story: As an Interviewer, I want to page through the interview feedback list, so that I can review all 52 scheduled candidates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Feedback screen; When there are more than 10 candidates; Then pagination controls allow moving to next and last pages

user_story: As an Interviewer, I want to refresh the list, so that I see the most recent interview statuses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Feedback screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records
